zh.lifeSummary: 當Alfonso XI de Castilla Rey de Castilla於1311年8月13日出生在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安薩拉曼卡時，他的父親Rey Fernando IV de Leão e Castela25歲，母親Constanza Dinisez de Portugal, Queen of Castile and Leon21歲。他於1328年6月24日與Maria de Portugal y de Castilla在葡萄牙瓜亞達阿爾法亞斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他於1340年在西班牙利安被列為king。他去世於1350年3月26日在西班牙吉布拉爾塔-斯潘 易特拉爾享年38歲，埋葬在西班牙吉布拉爾塔-斯潘 易特拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alfonso XI de Castilla Rey de Castilla于1311年8月13日出生在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安薩拉曼卡时，他的父亲Rey Fernando IV de Leão e Castela25岁，母亲Constanza Dinisez de Portugal, Queen of Castile and Leon21岁。他于1328年6月24日与Maria de Portugal y de Castilla在葡萄牙瓜亞達阿爾法亞斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他于1340年在西班牙利安被列为king。他去世于1350年3月26日在西班牙吉布拉爾塔-斯潘 易特拉爾享年38岁，埋葬在西班牙吉布拉爾塔-斯潘 易特拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Castilla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Alfredo, Carlos, Raul, Sergio, Jesus, Jorge, Pablo, Ruben, Blanca, Elido, Francisco, Guillermo.
Spanish: habitational name from Castile (Spanish Castilla), a region in central Spain. The name derives from the many castles in the region. This surname is also found in southern France.
History: As an independent kingdom between the 10th and 15th centuries, Castile formed the largest power in the Iberian peninsula.

variants.name: Castiglia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Annamarie, Antonino, Benedetto, Carmine, Francesco, Gaetano, Gennaro, Giacomo, Giuseppe, Ignazio.
Italian: habitational name from Castile (Italian Castiglia) in central Spain (see Castilla ).

nameMeanings.name: Alfonso
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Visigothic: probably a compound of adal ‘noble’ + funs ‘ready’; a traditional royal name.

nameMeanings.name: XI
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Alfonso XI de Castilla Rey de Castilla was born on 13 August 1311, in Salamanca, Castilla y León, Spain, his father, Rey Fernando IV de Leão e Castela, was 25 and his mother, Constanza Dinisez de Portugal, Queen of Castile and Leon, was 21. He married Maria de Portugal y de Castilla on 24 June 1328, in Alfaiates, Guarda, Portugal. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. In 1340, at the age of 29, his occupation is listed as king in León, Spain. He died on 26 March 1350, in Gibraltar-Spain neutral zone, Spain, at the age of 38, and was buried in Gibraltar-Spain neutral zone, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alfonso XI de Castilla Rey de Castilla est né le 13 août 1311, à Salamanca, Castilla y León, Espagne, son père, Rey Fernando IV de Leão e Castela, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Constanza Dinisez de Portugal, Queen of Castile and Leon, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Maria de Portugal y de Castilla le 24 juin 1328, à Alfaiates, Guarda, Portugal. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. En 1340, à l’âge de 29 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est king à León, Espagne. Il est décédé le 26 mars 1350, à Gibraltar-Spain neutral zone, Espagne, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Gibraltar-Spain neutral zone, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alfonso XI de Castilla Rey de Castilla am 13. August 1311 in Salamanca, Castilla y León, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rey Fernando IV de Leão e Castela 25 und seine Mutter Constanza Dinisez de Portugal, Queen of Castile and Leon 21. Er hat am 24. Juni 1328 in Alfaiates, Guarda, Portugal Maria de Portugal y de Castilla geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. 1340, als er 29 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als king in León, Spanien aufgeführt. Er starb am 26. März 1350 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Gibraltar-Spain neutral zone, Spanien und wurde in Gibraltar-Spain neutral zone, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alfonso XI de Castilla Rey de Castilla è nato il il 13 agosto 1311 nel Salamanca, Castilla y León, Spagna, il suo padre, Rey Fernando IV de Leão e Castela, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Constanza Dinisez de Portugal, Queen of Castile and Leon, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Maria de Portugal y de Castilla il 24 giugno 1328, nel Alfaiates, Guarda, Portogallo. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Nel 1340, all'età di 29 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come king nel León, Spagna. Morì il 26 marzo 1350, nel Gibraltar-Spain neutral zone, Spagna, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a Gibraltar-Spain neutral zone, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Alfonso XI de Castilla Rey de Castillaが1311年8月13日にスペインカスティラ イ レoンサラマンカで生まれた時，父Rey Fernando IV de Leão e Castelaは25歳，母Constanza Dinisez de Portugal, Queen of Castile and Leonは21歳であった。1328年6月24日にポルトガルグアルダアルファイアツでMaria de Portugal y de Castillaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。1340年，29歳の時，スペインレoンでの職業はkingと記録されている。彼は1350年3月26日にスペインギブラルター-スペイン ネウトラル ゾンで38歳で死去し，スペインギブラルター-スペイン ネウトラル ゾンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alfonso XI de Castilla Rey de Castilla(이)가 1311년 8월 13일 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 살램아카에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rey Fernando IV de Leão e Castela(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Constanza Dinisez de Portugal, Queen of Castile and Leon(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1328년 6월 24일 포르투갈 구아르다 알파이앳스에서 Maria de Portugal y de Castilla(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 1340년, 29세의 나이로 그의 직업은 스페인 레o에서 king이었다. 그는 1350년 3월 26일 스페인 깁럴타-스파인 니우트럴 존에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 깁럴타-스파인 니우트럴 존에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alfonso XI de Castilla Rey de Castilla nasceu em 13 de agosto de 1311, em Salamanca, Castilla y León, Espanha, seu pai, Rey Fernando IV de Leão e Castela, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Constanza Dinisez de Portugal, Queen of Castile and Leon, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Maria de Portugal y de Castilla em 24 de junho de 1328, em Alfaiates, Guarda, Portugal. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Em 1340, com 29 anos, sua profissão aparece como king em León, Espanha. Ele faleceu em 26 de março de 1350, em Gibraltar-Spain neutral zone, Espanha, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Gibraltar-Spain neutral zone, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alfonso XI de Castilla Rey de Castilla родился 13 августа 1311 г. в местности салэманка, кастилла и леoн, Испания, его отцу по имени Rey Fernando IV de Leão e Castela было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Constanza Dinisez de Portugal, Queen of Castile and Leon, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Maria de Portugal y de Castilla 24 июня 1328 г. в местности алфеиэитс, гуарда, Португалия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. В 1340 году, в возрасте 29 лет,  он работал по профессии king в местности леoн, Испания. Он умер 26 марта 1350 г. в местности гибралтар-спеин неутраль зоун, Испания в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности гибралтар-спеин неутраль зоун, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alfonso XI de Castilla Rey de Castilla nació el 13 de agosto de 1311, en Salamanca, Castilla y León, España, su papá, Rey Fernando IV de Leão e Castela, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Constanza Dinisez de Portugal, Queen of Castile and Leon, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Maria de Portugal y de Castilla el 24 de junio de 1328, en Alfaiates, Guarda, Portugal. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. En 1340, a la edad de 29 años, su ocupación registrada era king en León, España. Murió el 26 de marzo de 1350, en Gibraltar-Spain neutral zone, España, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en Gibraltar-Spain neutral zone, España.
